mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_portrait_generation WHERE prompt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR provider LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_portrait_generation (user_id, task_id, prompt, negative_prompt, reference_image_url, image_strength, width, height, provider, model_name, model_version, model_weight, style_preset, inference_steps, sampler_name, seed, generation_count, face_enhance, output_format, generated_image_urls, status, error_message, generation_time, queue_wait_time, created_at, updated_at, completed_at) VALUES
(#{generation.userId}, #{generation.taskId}, #{generation.prompt}, #{generation.negativePrompt}, #{generation.referenceImageUrl}, #{generation.imageStrength}, #{generation.width}, #{generation.height}, #{generation.provider}, #{generation.modelName}, #{generation.modelVersion}, #{generation.modelWeight}, #{generation.stylePreset}, #{generation.inferenceSteps}, #{generation.samplerName}, #{generation.seed}, #{generation.generationCount}, #{generation.faceEnhance}, #{generation.outputFormat}, #{generation.generatedImageUrls}, #{generation.status}, #{generation.errorMessage}, #{generation.generationTime}, #{generation.queueWaitTime}, #{generation.createdAt}, #{generation.updatedAt}, #{generation.completedAt})

update.foreach: UPDATE ai_portrait_generation SET user_id = #{generation.userId}, task_id = #{generation.taskId}, prompt = #{generation.prompt}, negative_prompt = #{generation.negativePrompt}, reference_image_url = #{generation.referenceImageUrl}, image_strength = #{generation.imageStrength}, width = #{generation.width}, height = #{generation.height}, provider = #{generation.provider}, model_name = #{generation.modelName}, model_version = #{generation.modelVersion}, model_weight = #{generation.modelWeight}, style_preset = #{generation.stylePreset}, inference_steps = #{generation.inferenceSteps}, sampler_name = #{generation.samplerName}, seed = #{generation.seed}, generation_count = #{generation.generationCount}, face_enhance = #{generation.faceEnhance}, output_format = #{generation.outputFormat}, generated_image_urls = #{generation.generatedImageUrls}, status = #{generation.status}, error_message = #{generation.errorMessage}, generation_time = #{generation.generationTime}, queue_wait_time = #{generation.queueWaitTime}, updated_at = #{generation.updatedAt}, completed_at = #{generation.completedAt} WHERE id = #{generation.id}

mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ai_portrait_generation WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalGenerations, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as totalUsers, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) as pendingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PROCESSING' THEN 1 END) as processingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 END) as successCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 END) as failedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT provider) as totalProviders, COUNT(DISTINCT model_name) as totalModels, DATE(created_at) as createDate, COUNT(*) as dailyCount FROM ai_portrait_generation GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT #{userId} as userId, COUNT(*) as generationCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 END) as successCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 END) as failedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT model_name) as modelCount, MIN(created_at) as firstGenerationTime, MAX(updated_at) as lastUpdateTime, AVG(generation_time) as avgGenerationTime FROM ai_portrait_generation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_portrait_generation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
